nodes.name: Eumyias
nodes.summary: Eumyias（Eumyias）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如Matinan blue flycatcher、Blue-fronted blue flycatcher、Timor blue flycatcher等11种鸟类。

nodes.name: Timor blue flycatcher
nodes.summary: The Timor blue flycatcher (Eumyias hyacinthinus) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found on Timor island. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Timor blue flycatcher (Eumyias hyacinthinus) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found on Timor island.

nodes.name: Timor blue flycatcher
